response.justification: Aisha has 12+ years of full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching the primary stack. Her roles demonstrate end-to-end ownership of scalable systems, including AI-agent infrastructure and high-throughput services, with measurable impact. While her current stack leans slightly more toward JavaScript ecosystems, her versatility across languages and commitment to modern tooling (e.g., Vitest, Docker) aligns well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React stack
Proven ability to build and scale high-throughput systems with measurable impact
Diverse technical background including AI-agent development and cloud-native practices
concerns: Limited exposure to Nest.js (primary backend framework in the role)
No explicit mention of Kotlin/Java (secondary technologies) in recent roles
Primary recent experience in JavaScript-heavy stacks may require ramp-up on Java-based backend services
